rawOutputPreview: **Bottom line:** This codebase has **26 untested source files, 0 tests, no test framework installed.** The highest-risk gaps are the auth layer (every request depends on it), login rate limiting (hard to verify without tests), and the approval/attendance routes (data integrity — an unchecked upsert can corrupt attendance records). The skeletons above cover the most critical 6 gaps with ~70 lines of tests each.
